title: Deliciously Dense Canadian Cheese Toast
description: A classic Canadian dish featuring toasted bread filled with a blend of cheeses and baked until golden brown, this lacto-vegetarian friendly recipe is perfect for a comforting snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Butter one side of each slice of bread.
In a large bowl, combine the cheddar, mozzarella, and parmesan cheese.
Add the beaten egg, salt, and pepper to the cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
Place one slice of bread, buttered side down, in a baking dish.
Spoon the cheese mixture onto the bread slice.
Place the second slice of bread, buttered side up, on top of the cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers with the remaining bread slices and cheese mixture.
Bake the cheese toast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the cheese toast from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
